title: galega orientalis
intro: Galega orientalis, also known as Russian knapweed or meadow knapweed, is a perennial herb in the pea family that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Galega orientalis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Galega orientalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
